recap: Argentina mounted a stunning second-half comeback against Egypt, erasing a 2-0 deficit with goals from Cristian Romero and Lionel Messi in quick succession before Enzo Fernandez's stoppage-time winner secured a 3-2 victory and a quarterfinal berth. Messi had squandered an earlier penalty that was saved by Mostafa Shobeir and struck the post when Egypt led 1-0, but the veteran forward delivered when it mattered most in the frantic closing stages. Egypt's early dominance through Yasser Ibrahim and Mostafa Zico proved costly as they failed to withstand Argentina's relentless pressure in the final minutes.
